name: explain-code
description: Explain what code does in plain language. Use when the user asks to explain, walk through, or help understand a piece of code, function, file, or error message. Adapts explanation depth to the user's apparent level.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Path to the file to explain

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Explanation level: beginner, intermediate, or expert
